title: obs_triage
description: The observability triage verdict for a queried signal: a disposition the observability loop routes on, a one-line summary, and supporting detail.

disposition.description: alert = the signal crossed a page-worthy threshold, notify the owning team; annotate = notable but not page-worthy, record a dashboard note; clear = nominal, no action.

summary.description: One crisp line stating what the signal shows and the recommended disposition.

detail.description: The supporting reading grounded in the query result (e.g. the value, the threshold, the trend). Empty when nominal.
